creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
I have submitted my own patch (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=215354) a couple of days later. Basically they are identical, except that I removed the variable GH_TAGNAME from the Makefile, because that was used to get a patch of a released version.

I don't mind which one you'll use.
